expectations.evidence: CSV contains all 29 items: SEO-01 through SEO-11 (11 items) and WP-01 through WP-18 (18 items), each with a result (Pass/Fail/Advisory).

expectations.text: SEO-XX, WP-XX 형식의 표준 코드 사용
expectations.evidence: All items use standard codes: SEO-01, SEO-02, ..., SEO-11, WP-01, WP-02, ..., WP-18.
SEO-05 marked Fail: '<meta name="description"> 태그 완전 누락. 검색 결과에 적절한 설명이 표시되지 않음.'
Both report.csv (31 lines) and report.html (353 lines) exist in the outputs directory with meaningful content.
Report is written primarily in Korean. HTML title is 'SEO & Web Performance 검토 결과', section headers are '검토 요약', '수정 가이드', and all item descriptions and fix guides are in Korean.
Report does NOT use SEO-01~11 / WP-01~18 format. It uses its own numbering system (24 ad-hoc issues across two files). No structured 29-item checklist.

expectations.text: SEO-XX, WP-XX 형식의 표준 코드 사용
expectations.evidence: Report uses custom issue IDs like 'SEO-001', 'SEO-002' etc. in a non-standard format, not the standard SEO-XX/WP-XX format.
Issue SEO-002 (Critical): 'Missing meta description tag' - 'No <meta name="description"> tag found.'
Both report.csv (27 lines) and report.html (477 lines) exist with meaningful content.
Report is written primarily in English. Title is 'SEO Optimization Review Report', all issue descriptions and recommendations are in English.
SEO-05 marked Fail: '<meta name="description"> 태그 없음. 검색 결과 스니펫에 표시될 설명이 없어 CTR 저하 우려.'
SEO-07 marked Fail: '<script type="application/ld+json"> 없음. 검색 결과 리치 스니펫 노출 불가.'
SEO-06 marked Fail: '<link rel="canonical"> 없음. 중복 콘텐츠 문제 발생 가능.'

expectations.text: title 태그가 너무 짧거나 일반적임을 지적
expectations.evidence: SEO-02 marked Fail: '<title>Sample Page</title> (11자) — 너무 짧고 비서술적. 50-60자 권장, 주요 키워드를 앞에 배치해야 함.'
Issue SEO-002 (Critical): 'Missing Meta Description - No <meta name="description"> tag found.'
Issue SEO-003 (Critical): 'No Structured Data (JSON-LD) - No JSON-LD or Schema.org structured data found on the page.'
Issue SEO-005 (Major): 'Missing Canonical URL - No <link rel="canonical"> tag found.'

expectations.text: title 태그가 너무 짧거나 일반적임을 지적
expectations.evidence: Issue SEO-001 (Critical): 'Generic Title Tag - The <title> is "Sample Page" which is too generic. It lacks target keywords, a brand name, and descriptive content.'
WP-04 marked Fail: 'dashboard.tsx line 50: img에 width/height 및 aspect-ratio 모두 없음. CLS 발생'.
WP-05 marked Fail: 'dashboard.tsx line 50: below-fold 이미지에 loading=lazy 없음'.
WP-09 marked Fail: 'dashboard.tsx lines 11-13: offsetHeight 읽기 후 style.minHeight 쓰기 — 강제 리플로우'.
WP-18 marked Fail: 'dashboard.tsx line 41: 동적 items 영역에 min-height 등 공간 예약 없음'. Also WP-16 Fail: 'dashboard.tsx lines 17-19: setTimeout 후 그리드 상단에 콘텐츠 동적 삽입. CLS 발생'.
Issue #2 (High): 'img 태그에 width/height 미지정 (CLS) - 에 width와 height 속성이 없어 이미지 로드 전까지 브라우저가 공간을 확보하지 못해 CLS가 발생한다.'
Issue #3 (High): 'Below-fold 이미지에 loading=lazy 미적용 - 페이지 하단(mt-8) 이미지에 loading=lazy가 없어 초기 로드 시 불필요한 네트워크 요청이 발생한다.'
Issue #6 (High): 'Layout thrashing (강제 리플로우) - offsetHeight 읽기 직후 style.minHeight를 설정하여 강제 리플로우가 연속 발생한다.'
Issue #1 (High): 'Dynamic content insertion without size reservation - setTimeout으로 items를 비동기 삽입하면서 컨테이너에 고정 높이나 min-height를 미리 확보하지 않아 레이아웃 이동(CLS)이 발생한다.'
WP-01 marked Fail: 'line 37: 인라인 <script>가 defer/async 없이 동기 실행됨. 렌더링 차단 발생.'
WP-10 marked Fail: 'line 13-17: @font-face에 font-display 속성 미설정. 기본값 "auto"로 FOIT 발생.'
WP-03 marked Fail: 'line 10: 외부 CSS가 media 속성 없이 동기 로딩. 렌더링 차단.'
WP-11 marked Fail: '<link rel="preload" as="font"> 태그 없음. 폰트 발견 지연.'
Issue: 'Inline render-blocking script' (High, line 37-44): 'Synchronous inline <script> in <body> blocks HTML parsing and rendering.'
Issue: 'Missing font-display descriptor' (High, lines 13-17): 'The @font-face declaration for CustomFont does not include font-display: swap. This causes Flash of Invisible Text (FOIT).'
Issue: 'Render-blocking external CSS' (High, line 10): 'The synchronous <link rel="stylesheet"> in <head> blocks rendering until the entire CSS file downloads.'
Issue: 'No font preloading' (Medium): 'The custom font file (/fonts/custom.woff2) is not preloaded. The browser discovers it only after parsing CSS, adding latency to font loading.'
CSV contains all 29 items: SEO-01 through SEO-11 and WP-01 through WP-18, each with a structured result (Pass/Fail/Advisory/N/A).

expectations.text: SEO-XX, WP-XX 형식의 표준 코드 사용
expectations.evidence: All items use standard SEO-XX and WP-XX codes: SEO-01, SEO-02, ..., SEO-11, WP-01, WP-02, ..., WP-18.
Every item has a result: ✅ Pass, ❌ Fail, ⚠️ Advisory, or ➖ N/A. No items are left without a result.
Issues include specific file:line references: 'index.html:6', 'index.html:37-44', 'dashboard.tsx:12-13', 'Card.tsx:11-20', 'index.html:13-17', etc.

Report uses custom numbering (SEO-01 through SEO-11 and WP-01 through WP-18 labels are used) but uses different item names than standard. The CSV contains 29 rows but with custom category names rather than standard item names.

expectations.text: SEO-XX, WP-XX 형식의 표준 코드 사용
expectations.evidence: CSV uses SEO-01 through SEO-11 and WP-01 through WP-18 codes in the id column.
All items have a status: FAIL, WARN, or PASS. Every row has a result designation.
Issues reference specific files and lines: 'index.html line 10', 'dashboard.tsx line 12-13', 'Card.tsx line 13', 'Card.tsx line 27', 'index.html line 42', etc.
